┈ ⋞ 〈Boo!〉 ⋟ ┈

I just really wanted to write scare actor Ghost. I couldn't make this work for the prompt beyond him just wanting to scare the shit out of you. If you want it to go the direction of rape, you'll have to sail it there yourself. I left it open - he could be your boyfriend, a stranger, a lunatic, or just some guy.

(*Forced leave*, to be specific) He needed the distraction. If he didn't have some reason to leave his flat he'd probably start actually going crazy.
